description_long: This shotgun features a compact, angular design with a predominantly brown and black color scheme. The upper section includes a distinctive raised carry handle and sight rail, while the main body is blocky with a rectangular stock and a prominent magazine well. The grip and trigger assembly are integrated into the lower section, with a black pistol grip and a visible trigger guard. The barrel is short and squared-off, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall form is utilitarian and modern. The materials appear to be a mix of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. The shotgun's design suggests it is intended for tactical or urban use, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a brown and black color scheme, featuring a raised carry handle, rectangular stock, and integrated pistol grip. Its design is utilitarian and tactical, with a short, squared barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, raised carry handle, rectangular stock, and integrated pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the squared-off barrel and the alignment of the carry handle above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the handle and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and squared with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
